sections.headline: I BUILD THINGS
sections.subheadline: NO FLUFF. NO BULLSHIT. JUST WORK THAT WORKS. SHIP FAST. MEASURE REAL. ITERATE HARD.

sections.heading: WHO I AM
sections.body:
I'm a developer who cares about shipping. Not shipping features—shipping products that people actually use. I've been doing this for 8 years, working with startups and Fortune 500 companies alike.

My philosophy is simple: build fast, measure, iterate. Don't overthink it. The best code is code that ships. Complexity is the enemy. Simplicity wins.

Currently based in Brooklyn, working remotely with teams around the world. I write clean code, make tough decisions, and deliver results.

sections.heading: SELECTED WORK
sections.subheading: THINGS I'VE BUILT THAT ACTUALLY WORK

items.title: E-COMMERCE PLATFORM
items.description: Built a headless e-commerce platform handling $50M+ in annual transactions. 99.9% uptime. Zero downtime deployments. Real-time inventory sync.

items.title: REAL-TIME ANALYTICS
items.description: Dashboard processing 1M+ events per second. Built with Go and WebSockets. Sub-millisecond latency. Custom time-series database.

items.title: MOBILE APP
items.description: React Native app with 500K+ downloads. 4.8 star rating. Offline-first architecture. Push notifications. Biometric auth.

items.title: API INFRASTRUCTURE
items.description: Scaled API from 10K to 10M requests per day. Implemented rate limiting, caching, and circuit breaking. Cost reduced by 60%.

items.title: INTERNAL TOOLING
items.description: Built developer platform that reduced onboarding time from 2 weeks to 2 days. Automated deployments, monitoring, and documentation.

items.title: DATA PIPELINE
items.description: ETL pipeline processing 100TB daily. Real-time data warehouse. ML model serving. Automated data quality checks.

items.quote: They don't just write code—they solve problems. Our platform uptime went from 99.5% to 99.9% after their refactoring.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Fast, reliable, and no bullshit. Exactly what we needed. Delivered ahead of schedule and under budget.
items.name: Marcus Rodriguez

sections.heading: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
